message:
fix(codegen): Migrate remaining _blk patterns to unique NameGen IDs

Complete the migration of all hardcoded _blk: block labels to use
dynamic __m{id}_xxx: patterns via self.nextNameId(). This prevents
naming conflicts when multiple instances are generated.

Modules updated:
- os.zig: pipe, fdopen now use unique block IDs
- random_mod.zig: Fix genChoice format string argument count (was 11, needed 12)
- cmath_mod.zig: sqrt now uses runtime generator
- hmac_mod.zig: new, digest now use runtime generators
- copyreg_mod.zig: newobj, newobj_ex now use runtime generators
- getpass_mod.zig: getpass, getuser now use runtime generators
- posix_mod.zig: All 15 functions converted to runtime generators
- string_mod.zig: capwords now uses runtime generator
- html_mod.zig: escape, unescape now use runtime generators

All comptime h.wrap()/h.c() templates that had hardcoded block labels
have been converted to runtime generator functions that call
self.nextNameId() for unique identifiers.
